queries.question: Give me all engineer jobs and architect jobs that have a salary of 80000
queries.sql:
SELECT Jobs.title 
FROM Jobs
WHERE (Jobs.technicalProfession = "Engineer" OR Jobs.technicalProfession = "Architect") AND Jobs.salary = 80000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?jobs p:title ?title .
  ?jobs p:technicalProfession ?technicalprofession_w .
  ?jobs p:technicalProfession ?technicalprofession_w2 .
  ?jobs p:salary ?salary_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?technicalprofession_w) = "Engineer" || STR(?technicalprofession_w2) = "Architect")) && (STR(?salary_w) = "80000" || STR(?salary_w) = "80000.0")))
}

queries.sql:
SELECT Jobs.title 
FROM Jobs
WHERE Jobs.technicalProfession = "Engineer" OR Jobs.technicalProfession = "Architect" AND Jobs.salary = 80000
